privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, publicly available LCA data: the USLCI (U.S. Life Cycle Inventory) Database maintained by NREL and the TRACI 2.1 LCIA method from the EPA. The target material HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) is documented in the USLCI database with cradle-to-gate LCA data from the American Chemical Council. The target impact category 'Global Warming' is the official TRACI 2.1 impact category measured in kg CO2 equivalents. The task requires creating a Sankey diagram visualizing contributions to Global Warming Potential for HDPE production using real LCA process data and methods.
